note: v311: Security hardening. Worker now sends COOP + X-Frame-Options on every asset, adds manifest-src / upgrade-insecure-requests to the CSP, a stricter Permissions-Policy, and HSTS preload; the /run cron test endpoint is refused when MANUAL_KEY is unset and compared in constant time. Client: invoice/expense line inputs use the shared escHtml() helper, and the signup password minimum is now 8 characters.
